title: Bridge Essay: Recent advances in understanding anorexia nervosa.
concept: Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mechanicality** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Habit — automaticity, habitual behavior, action monitoring, loss of conscious control.

**Recent advances in understanding anorexia nervosa.** - F1000Res (2019). DOI: 10.12688/f1000research.17789.1. PMID: 31069054. Anorexia nervosa is a complex psychiatric illness associated with food restriction and high mortality. Recent brain research in adolescents and adults with anorexia nervosa has used larger sample sizes compared with earlier studies and tasks that test specific brain circuits. Those studies have produced more robust results and advanced our knowledge of underlying biological mechanisms that may contribute to the development and maintenance of anorexia nervosa.
